moments.title: Premier League Transfer Window Open
moments.blurb: The Premier League's summer transfer window officially opened yesterday, Monday 15 June, with clubs already making significant moves ahead of the 2026/27 season.

angles.name: Transfer Talk
angles.copy: The summer transfer window is officially open! Who's your club signing, selling, or desperately holding onto? The rumour mill is in overdrive. #TransferWindow

angles.name: Big Moves Already
angles.copy: Anthony Gordon to Barcelona, Marcos Senesi to Spurs... the Premier League transfer window is already heating up! What's been the most shocking move so far?

angles.name: Your Club's Needs
angles.copy: With the transfer window wide open, what's the one player your team *must* sign this summer? Let's hear the shouts for your club! #FootballTransfers

moments.title: Paul McCartney Turns 84
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatle and Wings frontman Paul McCartney celebrates his 84th birthday on Thursday, June 18.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Macca
angles.copy: On Thursday, Sir Paul McCartney turns 84! What's your favourite Beatles, Wings or solo track from the living legend? #PaulMcCartney

angles.name: Iconic Song
angles.copy: From 'Yesterday' to 'Live and Let Die' – Paul McCartney's songwriting genius is unmatched. Wishing a very happy 84th birthday to a true icon on Thursday!

angles.name: Birthday Playlist
angles.copy: Celebrating Paul McCartney's 84th birthday this week with a playlist of his greatest hits! What absolutely HAS to be on it?

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival returns from Thursday 18 – Sunday 21 June, featuring headliners Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, and The Cure, alongside a host of other acts.

source.l: Isle of Wight Festival Official Site

angles.name: Festival Fever
angles.copy: Isle of Wight Festival starts Thursday! Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, The Cure – who are you most excited to see on the island? #IOW2026

angles.name: Road to the Island
angles.copy: Heading to the Isle of Wight Festival this weekend? Get ready for four days of incredible music and island vibes! What's your top tip for festival-goers?

angles.name: IOW Lineup
angles.copy: From rock legends The Cure to dance superstar Calvin Harris, the Isle of Wight Festival lineup is HUGE! What's your must-see set this year?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Begins in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Scotland's biggest music festival, TRNSMT, takes over Glasgow Green from Friday 19 – Sunday 21 June with headliners including Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, Lewis Capaldi, and Nile Rodgers & CHIC.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Ready
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival kicks off Friday in Glasgow! Who's heading to Scotland's biggest music event this weekend? #TRNSMT2026

angles.name: TRNSMT Headliners
angles.copy: From Richard Ashcroft to Lewis Capaldi, the TRNSMT lineup is stacked! Which act are you buzzing to see most in Glasgow?

angles.name: City Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Three days of incredible music in the heart of Glasgow – TRNSMT Festival is back! Get ready for a huge weekend.

moments.title: Scotland Face Morocco in World Cup
moments.blurb: Scotland continues their FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign with a crucial group stage match against Morocco on Friday 19 June, kicking off at 11pm BST.

angles.name: Tartan Army Ready
angles.copy: It's Scotland's second World Cup group game on Friday! Can the Tartan Army get another win against Morocco? Kick-off 11pm BST! #Scotland

angles.name: Match Day Build-Up
angles.copy: Get ready, Scotland fans! The big game against Morocco is Friday night. Where will you be watching?

angles.name: World Cup Hopes
angles.copy: After a decent start, Scotland look to build momentum in the World Cup. Huge game coming on Friday night! #WorldCup2026

moments.title: Hampton Court Palace Festival Continues
moments.blurb: The Hampton Court Palace Festival continues this week with performances from The Stranglers (Tuesday), Nile Rodgers & CHIC (Wednesday), Elvis Costello & The Imposters (Thursday), Sophie Ellis-Bextor (Friday), and 80s Classical (Saturday).

angles.name: Palace Gigs
angles.copy: Hampton Court Palace Festival rolls on! Catch The Stranglers tonight, Nile Rodgers & CHIC tomorrow, and more incredible acts this week in a stunning setting.

angles.name: Iconic Lineup
angles.copy: From punk legends to disco kings, the Hampton Court Palace Festival has something for everyone this week. Who are you seeing? #LiveMusicLondon

angles.name: Sophie & 80s Classical
angles.copy: Still time to catch Sophie Ellis-Bextor's Palace Disco on Friday or 80s Classical on Saturday at Hampton Court! An unforgettable experience.

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday 21 June 2026 at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the longest day of the year! The Summer Solstice is this Sunday, June 21st. How are you planning to make the most of the extra daylight? #SummerSolstice

angles.name: Late Sunsets
angles.copy: Enjoy those incredibly late sunsets this week as we head towards the Summer Solstice on Sunday. Perfect for evening walks and outdoor plans!

angles.name: Midsummer Magic
angles.copy: Midsummer is almost here! The Summer Solstice marks a time of light, growth, and renewal. What are you looking forward to this summer?

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: Series 13 of Love Island UK is in full swing, airing nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with fresh drama, new bombshells, and unexpected dumpings keeping viewers hooked.

angles.name: Villa Latest
angles.copy: Did you catch last night's Love Island? The villa is serving up some serious drama! Who's your favourite couple right now? #LoveIslandUK

angles.name: Bombshell Impact
angles.copy: New bombshells are shaking things up in the Love Island villa! Who do you think will be coupling up next?

angles.name: Football Crossover
angles.copy: With the World Cup crossover theme this year, are you team football or team Love Island tonight? Or both?!

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday on Thursday, June 20.

angles.name: Hello, Lionel!
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the incredible Lionel Richie on Thursday! What's your go-to Lionel track? #LionelRichie

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: From The Commodores to his incredible solo career, Lionel Richie has given us countless hits. Celebrating his 77th birthday this week!

angles.name: Easy Listening Icon
angles.copy: Get ready for some smooth tunes as we celebrate Lionel Richie's birthday this Thursday! The perfect soundtrack for your day. #EasyListening

moments.title: Wales Rugby vs Barbarians
moments.blurb: Wales will play a warm-up match against the Barbarians at Twickenham on Saturday 27 June, ahead of their inaugural Nations Championship campaign.

angles.name: Cymru Ready
angles.copy: The Barbarians await! Wales take on the invitational side at Twickenham on Saturday 27 June. A big warm-up before the Nations Championship! #CymruRugby

angles.name: Twickenham Clash
angles.copy: Wales head to Twickenham to face the Barbarians next Saturday. What kind of performance are you expecting from the boys in red?

angles.name: Nations Championship Build-Up
angles.copy: Excitement is building for the Nations Championship, and Wales' clash with the Barbarians next Saturday is the perfect curtain-raiser! #Rugby

moments.title: Lana Del Rey's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey celebrates her 41st birthday on Sunday, June 21.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Lana
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 41st birthday to the one and only Lana Del Rey this Sunday! What's your favourite melancholic masterpiece from her? #LanaDelRey

angles.name: Lana's Influence
angles.copy: Known for her cinematic sound and evocative lyrics, Lana Del Rey turns 41 on Sunday. Her impact on modern music is undeniable!

angles.name: Birthday Vibes
angles.copy: Get into the mood for Lana Del Rey's birthday on Sunday with a playlist of her most iconic tracks. Pure vibes! #NewMusic

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper Turns 73
moments.blurb: Iconic singer-songwriter and actress Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday on Monday, June 22.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the incredible Cyndi Lauper on Monday! What's your favourite track from the 80s icon? #CyndiLauper

angles.name: True Colours
angles.copy: From 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' to 'True Colors', Cyndi Lauper's music is timeless. Wishing her a very happy birthday on Monday!

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only Cyndi Lauper's birthday this Monday! Get ready for a blast of 80s pop perfection. #80sPop

moments.title: Scotland vs Brazil in World Cup
moments.blurb: Scotland faces their toughest challenge yet in the FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage, taking on five-time champions Brazil on Wednesday 24 June, at 11pm BST.

angles.name: Brazil Challenge
angles.copy: Can Scotland pull off a World Cup shock against Brazil next Wednesday? The Tartan Army will be roaring them on! Kick-off 11pm BST. #SCOvBRA

angles.name: Underdog Story
angles.copy: It's the ultimate test for Scotland next Wednesday against Brazil. Could this be the night for a legendary World Cup upset?

angles.name: Group Stage Finale
angles.copy: Scotland's final group game is a massive one against Brazil next Wednesday. All eyes on the Tartan Army! #Football

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival Debuts
moments.blurb: The brand new Blenheim Palace Festival launches on Saturday 27 June, bringing Katy Perry, Teddy Swims, Lauren Spencer-Smith, and Pete Tong Ibiza Classics to the stunning Oxfordshire venue.

angles.name: New Festival Alert
angles.copy: A brand new festival is coming! Blenheim Palace Festival kicks off next Saturday with Katy Perry, Pete Tong, and more. Who's excited? #BlenheimPalace

angles.name: Pop & Dance in a Palace
angles.copy: Imagine seeing Katy Perry or Pete Tong Ibiza Classics in the stunning grounds of Blenheim Palace! The new festival starts next Saturday.

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Looking for plans next weekend? The debut Blenheim Palace Festival promises an unforgettable experience with huge names in pop and dance! #OxfordshireEvents

moments.title: State Fayre Festival Opens
moments.blurb: The UK's biggest music & BBQ festival, State Fayre, takes place at Hylands Park, Essex, from Friday 26 – Sunday 28 June, headlined by Kings of Leon, Alanis Morissette, and The Lumineers.

angles.name: Music & BBQ
angles.copy: Music and BBQ? Yes please! State Fayre Festival kicks off next Friday in Essex with Kings of Leon, Alanis Morissette & The Lumineers! #StateFayre

angles.name: Essex Festival
angles.copy: Hylands Park in Essex hosts the new State Fayre Festival next weekend! Get ready for three days of live music, delicious food, and good times.

angles.name: Rock Legends
angles.copy: Kings of Leon, Alanis Morissette, The Lumineers – what a lineup for the inaugural State Fayre Festival next weekend! Who are you hoping to see?

moments.title: Ariana Grande Turns 33
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday on Saturday, June 26.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ariana
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 33rd birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande next Saturday! What's your favourite hit from the pop queen? #ArianaGrande

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: From 'Thank U, Next' to 'Positions', Ariana Grande consistently delivers chart-topping anthems. Celebrating her 33rd birthday next Saturday!

angles.name: Birthday Playlist
angles.copy: Get ready to dance! We're celebrating Ariana Grande's birthday next Saturday with a playlist of her biggest bangers. What's on your list?
